title: Envelope-delegated auto-accept levels
goal: Implement AF-06 from docs/roadmap/auto-frontier/07-auto-accept.md after HERDR-07/RW-2 is closed. For Tier-1 add_followup_slice proposals within envelope and budget, runs at autonomy promote/run may record an accepted decision with authorizer envelope:<run_id> and source frontier_policy, then apply through the AF-05 engine. Promote creates and commits generated slices without running them; run appends and executes them serially. Enforce stop rules, budget consumption, notification for Tier-3, and the AF-00 evidence gate.
acceptance: promote/run autonomy levels can auto-record accepted decisions only for Tier-1 add_followup_slice proposals within envelope and budget, with authorizer envelope:<run_id>, source frontier_policy, and reason codes.
Auto-accepted proposals apply through the AF-05 engine only; no second apply path or mutation surface is introduced.
promote commits generated slices but does not run them; run appends generated slices serially and executes them, respecting max_auto_promotions, max_generated_slices, and max_depth.
Tier-2/Tier-3/non-followup/rejected/deferred/envelope-less candidates are never auto-accepted; Tier-3 and budget/depth stops surface structured attention and RW-2 notification evidence.
Crash/resume preserves budget consumption and idempotent apply without double-spend or duplicate promotion.
must_ask_if: If the implementation would create a second proposal, decision, or apply authority channel outside the existing replan mechanism, stop and ask.
If required runtime behavior cannot be implemented within the declared areas, stop and ask rather than widening scope silently.
If a dependency or prerequisite from docs/roadmap/auto-frontier/00-matrix.md is not satisfied, stop and report the blocker.
If the AF-00 evidence bar cannot be satisfied or encoded as a hard gate, stop and ask before granting run-level auto-authority.
